title.ko: 비용적형의 기계 또는 기관, 예. 증기터빈(연소기관 F02; 액체용 기계 또는 기관 F03, F04; 비용적형 펌프 F04D)
title.en: NON-POSITIVE-DISPLACEMENT MACHINES OR ENGINES, e.g. STEAM TURBINES (combustion engines F02;machines or engines for liquids F03, F04;non-positive-displacement pumps F04D)

definition.ko: 비체적용 기계 또는 기관 일반적 특징; 축추력 평형 장치; 순수한 회전과는 다른 방식을 가진 것 F01D1/00; 3/00; 23/00 구성 부품 브레이드와 그의 지지부재, 브레이드 보호 부재; 가조정 브레이드를 가진 로터; 고정자 F01D5/00; 7/00; 9/00 내부 누출에 대한 수단 F01D11/00 기계나 기관의 조합 또는 결합 F01D13/00, F01D15/00 조정, 제어, 안전장치 F01D17/00, F01D19/00; 21/00 시동; 정지 F01D21/00 기타 부품과 부속품 F01D19/00, F01D25/00

title.ko: 비용적형 기계 또는 기관, 예. 증기터빈(축추력과 평형시키기 위하여 작동유체를 축방향의 서로 반대 측으로부터 도입하도록 한 것 F01D 3/02; 순수한 회전과는 다른 방식을 가진 것 F01D 23/00; 특수한 증기계통, 사이틀 작동, 조속장치를 가진 터빈 F01K)
title.en: Non-positive-displacement machines or engines, e.g. steam turbines (with working-fluid flows in opposite axial directions for balancing axial thrust F01D0003020000;with other than pure rotation F01D0023000000;turbines characterised by their use in special steam systems, cycles, or processes, regulating devices therefor F01K)

title.ko: 안내수단과 블레이드 또는 로터를 갖는 정지상의 작동유체의 것(F01D 1/24가 우선); 작동유체 안내수단이 없는 것 F01D 1/18)
title.en: with stationary working-fluid guiding means and bladed or like rotor (F01D0001240000 takes precedence;without working-fluid guiding means F01D0001180000)
traversed by the working-fluid substantially axially
traversed by the working-fluid substantially radially
having inward flow

title.ko: 실질적인 중간압력의 변화없이 작동유체의 흐름을 맞이 하는 2개 이상의 단(stage)을 가진 것, 즉. 속도단을 가진 것 (F01D1/12 우선)
title.en: having two or more stages subjected to working-fluid flow without essential intermediate pressure change, i.e. with velocity stages (F01D0001120000 takes precedence)
with repeated action on same blade ring
traversed by the working-fluid substantially radially
characterised by having both reaction stages and impulse stages

title.ko: 작동유체 안내편이 없는 것(F01D 1/24, 1/32, 1/34이 우선)
title.en: without working-fluid guiding means (F01D0001240000, F01D0001320000, F01D0001340000 take precedence)
traversed by the working-fluid substantially axially
traversed by the working-fluid substantially radially
characterised by counter-rotating rotors subjected to same working-fluid stream without intermediate stator blades or the like
traversed by the working-fluid substantially axially
traversed by the working-fluid substantially radially

title.ko: 양방향 회전작동용 단일 로터를 특징으로 하는 것, 예. 블레이드의 역전에 의한 것(기계와 기관의 조합 F01D 13/00)
title.en: characterised by having a single rotor operable in either direction of rotation, e.g. by reversing of blades (combinations of machines or engines F01D0013000000)
with pressure/velocity transformation exclusively in rotor, e.g. the rotor rotating under the influence of jets issuing from the rotor

title.ko: 블레이드 없는 로터를 특징으로 하는 것, 예. 천공된 구멍을 가진 것(F01D 1/32이 우선; 사이렌 G01K 7/00)
title.en: characterised by non-bladed rotor, e.g. with drilled holes (F01D0001320000 takes precedence;sirens G10K0007000000)
using fluid friction
of the screw type
Machines or engines with axial-thrust balancing effected by working fluid
characterised by having one fluid flow in one axial direction and another fluid flow in the opposite direction
axial thrust being compensated by thrust-balancing dummy piston or the like

title.ko: 블레이드; 블레이드 지지부재(노즐 상자 F01D 9/02) 블레이드 등에 장치된 가열, 단열, 냉각 또는 진동방지 수단
title.en: Blades; Blade-carrying members (nozzle boxes F01D0009020000); Heating, heat-insulating, cooling, or antivibration means on the blades or the members

title.ko: 블레이드지지부재, 예. 로터(블레이드가 없는 로터 F01D 1/34; 고정자 F01D 9/00)
title.en: Blade-carrying members, e.g. rotors (rotors of non-bladed type F01D0001340000;stators F01D0009000000)
Annular blade-carrying members having blades on the inner periphery of the annulus and extending inwardly radially, i.e. inverted rotors
for radial-flow machines or engines
Rotors for more than one axial stage, e.g. of drum or multiple-disc type; Details thereof, e.g. shafts, shaft connections
Heating, heat-insulating, or cooling means
Antivibration means

title.ko: 블레이드(블레이드의 뿌리 부분 F01D 5/30; 작동시 조정가능한 블레이드를 가진 로터 F01D 7/00; 고정자 블레이드 F01D 9/02)
title.en: Blades (blade roots F01D0005300000;rotors with blades adjustable in operation F01D0007000000;stator blades F01D0009020000)

title.ko: 형상 또는 구조(부식, 침식에 대처하기 위한 재질과 수단의 선정 F01D 5/28)
title.en: Form or construction (selecting particular materials, measures against erosion or corrosion F01D0005280000)
for counteracting blade vibration
Hollow blades; Heating, heat-insulating, or cooling means on blades
Specially-shaped blade tips to seal space between tips and stator
Blade-to-blade connections, e.g. by shrouding
using wire or the like
Antivibration means not restricted to blade form or construction or to blade-to-blade connections
Selecting particular materials; Measures against erosion or corrosion
Fixing blades to rotors; Blade roots
Locking, e.g. by final locking-blades or keys
Rotor-blade aggregates of unitary construction

title.ko: 작동중에 조정가능한 블레이드를 가진 로터 그의 제어(역전을 위한것 F01D 1/30)
title.en: Rotors with blades adjustable in operation; Control thereof (for reversing F01D0001300000)
having adjustment responsive to speed
Stators
Nozzles; Nozzle boxes; Stator blades; Guide conduits
forming ring or sector
Fluid supply conduits to nozzles or the like

title.ko: 작동유체의 내부 누설을 방지 또는 감소하기 위한 장치, 예. 각단계의 누설방지(씰링 일반 F16J)
title.en: Preventing or minimising internal leakage of working fluid, e.g. between stages (sealings in general F16J)

title.ko: 비접촉식의 씰링에 의한 것, 예 라비린스(labyrinch) (로터블레이드팁과 고정자간의 밀폐 F01D 11/18)
title.en: by non-contact sealings, e.g. of labyrinth type (for sealing space between rotor blade tips and stator F01D0011080000)
using sealing fluid, e.g. steam
Control thereof

title.ko: 로터블레이드 팁과 고정자간과 사이의 공간 실링 (특수형상의 블레이드팁 F01D 5/20)
title.en: for sealing space between rotor blade tips and stator (specially-shaped blade tips therefor F01D0005200000)
using sealing fluid, e.g. steam
using a rubstrip, e.g. erodible, deformable or resiliently biased part

title.ko: 팁의 간격을 조정하거나 맞추는 것, 즉. 로터 블레이드 팁(rotor-blade tips)과 고정자 케이싱과의 거리(작동중 블레이드를 가진 로터를 조정하는 것 F01D 7/00)
title.en: Adjusting or regulating tip-clearance, i.e. distance between rotor-blade tips and stator casing (rotors with blades adjustable in operation F01D0007000000)

title.ko: 자체 조정수단에 의한 것(F01D 11/12 우선)
title.en: by self-adjusting means (F01D0011120000 takes precedence)
using stator or rotor components with predetermined thermal response, e.g. selective insulation, thermal inertia, differential expansion
Actively adjusting tip-clearance
by mechanically actuating the stator or rotor components, e.g. moving shroud sections relative to the rotor
by selectively cooling or heating stator or rotor components

title.ko: 둘 이상의 기계 또는 기관의 조합 (F01D15/00 이 우선; 둘 이상의 펌프의 조합 F04; 유체 전동장치 F16H)
title.en: Combinations of two or more machines or engines (F01D0015000000 takes precedence;combinations of two or more pumps F04;fluid gearing F16H)
Working-fluid interconnection of machines or engines

title.ko: 특별한 사용을 위한 기계 또는 기관의 적용; 그것에 의해 구동되는 장치를 가지는 기관의 조합
title.en: Adaptations of machines or engines for special use; Combinations of engines with devices driven thereby
Adaptations for driving vehicles, e.g. locomotives
the vehicles being waterborne vessels
Adaptations for driving, or combinations with, hand-held tools or the like
Adaptations for driving, or combinations with, pumps
Adaptations for driving, or combinations with, electric generators

title.ko: 기계적 전동장치와의 조합(멀티기관에 의한 구동 F01D 13/00)
title.en: Combinations with mechanical gearing (driven by multiple engines F01D0013000000)

title.ko: 흐름의 변화에 의한 조속 또는 제어(역전용 F01D 1/30; 로터 블레이드 위치의 변경에 의한 것 F01D 7/00; 시동용 19/00; 정지용 F01D 21/00; 조정 또는 제어 일반 G05)
title.en: Regulating or controlling by varying flow (for reversing F01D0001300000;by varying rotor blade position F01D0007000000;specially for starting F01D0019000000;shutting-down F01D0021000000;regulating or controlling in general G05)
Arrangement of sensing elements
responsive to load
responsive to speed
responsive to condition of working fluid, e.g. pressure

title.ko: 최종적 액튜에이터(밸브 일반 F16K)
title.en: Final actuators (valves in general F16K)
arranged in stator parts
varying effective cross-sectional area of nozzles or guide conduits
by means of nozzle vanes
varying effective number of nozzles or guide conduits

title.ko: 검출요소 또는 최종 액튜에이터(finial actuetor)와 관련하는 장치 또는 양자사이의 전달수단(검출요소 자체 F01D 17/02; 최종 액튜에이터(finial actuators) F01D 17/10)
title.en: Devices dealing with sensing elements or final actuators or transmitting means between them, e.g. power-assisted (sensing elements alone F01D0017020000;final actuators alone F01D0017100000)
the operation or power assistance being predominantly non-mechanical
electrical
fluid, e.g. hydraulic

title.ko: 기계 또는 기관이 시동 그것에 장치되는 조정, 제어 또는 안전장치(시동 전의 워밍업 F01D 25/10; 미동 장치 F01D 25/34)
title.en: Starting of machines or engines; Regulating, controlling, or safety means in connection therewith (warming-up before starting F01D0025100000;turning or inching gear F01D0025340000)
dependent on temperature of component parts, e.g. of turbine casing
Shutting-down of machines or engines, e.g. in emergency; Regulating, controlling, or safety means not otherwise provided for
Shutting-down responsive to overspeed
responsive to undesired position of rotor relative to stator, e.g. indicating such position
Shutting-down
Restoring position
responsive to unwanted deposits on blades, in working-fluid conduits, or the like
responsive to temperature
responsive to other specific conditions
Trip gear
involving hydraulic means
Checking operation of shut-down devices
Non-positive-displacement machines or engines with movement other than pure rotation, e.g. of endless-chain type

title.ko: 타의 그룹으로 분류되지 않은 구성부품, 세부, 또는 부속품
title.en: Component parts, details, or accessories, not provided for in, or of interest apart from, other groups
De-icing means for engines having icing phenomena

title.ko: 방진장치
title.en: Antivibration arrangements

title.ko: 블레이드의 방진장치(블레이드 또는 블레이드 지지부재상에 마련된것 F01D 5/00)
title.en: for preventing blade vibration (means on blade-carrying members or blades F01D0005000000)

title.ko: 냉각(기계 또는 기관의 냉각 일반 F01P); 가열; 단열(블레이드 또는 블레이드 지지부재의 단열 F01D 5/00)
title.en: Cooling (of machines or engines in general F01P); Heating; Heat insulation (of blade-carrying members, of blades F01D0005000000)
Heating, e.g. warming-up before starting
Cooling

title.ko: 케이싱의 개량(더블케이싱 F01D 25/26)
title.en: Casings modified therefor (double casings F01D0025260000)

title.ko: 축수(베어링)의 배열; 케이싱내에서의 베어링의 지지 또는 부착(축수 그 자체 F16C)
title.en: Arrangement of bearings; Supporting or mounting bearings in casings (bearings per seF16C)

title.ko: 윤활장치(기계 또는 기관의 윤활 일반 F01M)
title.en: Lubricating arrangements (of machines or engines in general F01M)
using lubrication pumps
using working fluid or other gaseous fluid as lubricant

title.ko: 케이싱(가열 또는 냉각을 위한 개량 F01D 25/14); 케이싱의 부분품, 예. 다이어프램, 케이싱 고착구 (회전식 기계 또는 기관용 케이싱 일반 F16M)
title.en: Casings (modified for heating or cooling F01D0025140000); Casing parts, e.g. diaphragms, casing fastenings (casings for rotary machines or engines in general F16M)
Double casings; Measures against temperature strain in casings
Supporting or mounting arrangements, e.g. for turbine casing
Exhaust heads, chambers, or the like
Collecting of condensation water; Drainage
Turning or inching gear
using electric motors
